channel.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws Aug 14th, 2019
item.description:
Guides, Books, Documentation, and Training

Case Studies: Powered by AWS

  • Adobe
  • Airbnb
  • Comcast
  • Dow Jones
  • Expedia
  • Foursquare
  • Instrumental
  • Lionsgate
  • mlbam
  • NASA
  • Netflix
  • Nike
  • Nokia
  • Pfizer
  • Reddit
  • Samsung
  • Slack
  • Spotify
  • Swiftkey
  • Time Inc
  • Twilio
  • Yelp

    • Social

    Blogs

  • DevOps
  • Architecture
  • Big Data
  • Mobile
  • Messaging
  • Java
  • PHP
  • Ruby
  • .NET
  • Security

    • SDKs and Samples

    Python SDK

  • Docs

item.description:
Social

Conferences

  • AWSome Day - Global one-day events are delivered by AWS Education's technical instructors and are ideal for IT pros, developers and technical managers who would like to learn about how to get started in the AWS Cloud.

    Python SDK

  • Repo 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥stars6.3k

  • aws-quickstart - Official repository for AWS Quick Start.

item.description:

Lambda

  • chalice 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥stars7.9k - Python Serverless Microframework.

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws Dec 5th, 2016
item.description:
Appendix of Core Services

Compute Services

  • Lightsail - Launch and manage simple virtual private servers.
  • Elastic GPUs - Attach low-cost GPUs to EC2 instances for graphics acceleration.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Artificial Intelligence

  • Rekognition - Deep learning-based image analysis.
  • Polly - Turn text into lifelike speech.
  • Lex - Build conversational interfaces through voice or text.
  • Machine Learning - Provides managed machine learning technology.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Analytics Services

  • Athena - Query data on S3 instantly.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Security and Identity Services

  • Shield - Managed DDoS Protection.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Mobile Services

  • Pinpoint - Targeted push notifications for mobile apps.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Management Tools

  • Personal Health Dashboard - Your personalized view of service health.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Developer Tools

  • CodeBuild - Build and test code.

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Appendix of Core Services

Developer Tools

  • X-Ray - Analyze and debug your applications.
  • CodeCommit - Hosted Git version control service.
  • CodeDeploy - Provides automated code deployment to EC2 instances.
  • CodePipeline - Continuous delivery service.
  • Command Line Interface (CLI) - Provides a CLI to manage all services.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Compute Services

  • Blox - Open source projects for building custom schedulers on ECS.
  • Batch - Run batch jobs at scale.
  • EC2 Systems Manager - Easily configure and manage EC2 and on-premises systems.
  • Auto Scaling - Launches or terminates EC2 instances based on policies, schedules, and health checks.
  • EC2 Container Service (ECS) - Supports Docker containers on EC2 instances.
  • Elastic Beanstalk - Provides quick deployment and management of applications in the cloud.
  • Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2) - Provides scalable virtual private servers using Xen.
  • Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) - Automatically distributes incoming traffic across multiple EC2 instances.
  • Lambda - Runs code in response to events and automatically manages EC2 instances.
  • Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) - Creates a logically isolated set of EC2 instances which can be connected to an existing network using a VPN connection.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Networking Services

  • Direct Connect - Provides dedicated connections to AWS for faster and cheaper data throughput.
  • Elastic Load Balancing (ELB) - Automatically distributes incoming traffic across multiple EC2 instances.
  • Route 53 - Provides a highly available and scalable Domain Name System (DNS) web service.
  • Virtual Private Cloud (VPC) - Creates a logically isolated set of EC2 instances which can be connected to an existing network using a VPN connection.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Enterprise Applications

  • WorkDocs - Provides a fully managed, secure enterprise storage and sharing service.
  • WorkMail - Provides managed email and calendaring service.
  • WorkSpaces - Provides a cloud-based desktop experience to end-users.
  • Workspaces Application Manager (WAM) - Simplifies deployment and management of WorkSpaces.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Analytics Services

  • Data Pipeline - Provides workload management by processing and moving data between services.
  • Elastic MapReduce (EMR) - Hosts a Hadoop and Spark framework running on EC2 and S3.
  • Elasticsearch Service (ES) - Managed Elasticsearch, a popular open-source search and analytics engine.
  • Glue - Prepare and load data to data stores.
  • Kinesis - Provides real-time data processing over large, distributed data streams.
  • Kinesis Analytics - Write standard SQL queries on streaming data without having to learn any new programming skills.
  • Kinesis Firehose - Captures and automatically loads streaming data into S3 and Redshift.
  • Quicksight - Provides cloud-powered business intelligence for 1/10th the cost of traditional BI solutions.
  • Redshift - Provides petabyte-scale data warehousing with columnar storage and multi-node compute.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Management Tools

  • CloudFormation - Provides a file-based interface for provisioning other resources.
  • CloudTrail - Provides logs of all activity.
  • CloudWatch - Provides monitoring for AWS cloud resources and applications, starting with EC2.
  • Command Line Interface (CLI) - Provides a CLI to manage all services.
  • Config - Provides a detailed view of all resources.
  • Management Console (AWS Console) - A web-based interface to manage all services.
  • OpsWorks - Provides configuration of EC2 services using Chef.
  • Service Catalog - Service Catalog allows IT administrators to create, manage, and distribute portfolios of approved products to end users, who can then access the products they need in a personalized portal.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Security and Identity Services

  • Certificate Manager - Lets you easily provision, manage, and deploy SSL/TLS certificates for use with AWS services.
  • CloudHSM - Helps meet corporate, contractual and regulatory compliance requirements for data security by using dedicated Hardware Security Module (HSM) appliances within the AWS cloud.
  • Directory Service - A managed service that allows you to connect your resources with an existing on-premises Microsoft Active Directory or to set up a new, stand-alone directory in the AWS Cloud.
  • Identity and Access Management (IAM) - An implicit service, the authentication infrastructure used to authenticate access to the various services.
  • Inspector - An automated security assessment service that helps improve the security and compliance of applications deployed on AWS.
  • Key Management Service (KMS) - A managed service that makes it easy for you to create and control the encryption keys used to encrypt your data.
  • WAF - A web application firewall service that monitors and manages CloudFront distributions.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Internet of Things Service

  • IoT - Enables secure, bi-directional communication between internet-connected things (such as sensors, actuators, embedded devices, or smart appliances) and the AWS cloud over MQTT and HTTP.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Mobile Services

  • API Gateway - Service for publishing, maintaining and securing web service APIs.
  • Cognito - Provides user identity and data synchronization.
  • Device Farm - App testing service for iOS, Android and Fire OS apps on physical devices.
  • Mobile Analytics - Service for collecting, visualizing, and understanding app usage data.
  • Mobile Hub - Provides an integrated console that helps you build, test, and monitor your mobile apps.
  • Simple Notification Service (SNS) - Provides a hosted multi-protocol "push" messaging for applications.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Storage and Content Delivery Services

  • CloudFront - A content delivery network (CDN) for distributing objects to locations near the requester.
  • Elastic Block Store (EBS) - Provides persistent block-level storage volumes for EC2.
  • Elastic File System (EFS) - A file storage service for EC2 instances.
  • Glacier - Provides a low-cost, long-term storage option, intended for archiving data.
  • Import/Export - Accelerates moving large amounts of data into and out of AWS using portable storage devices for transport.
  • Simple Storage Service (S3) - Provides Web Service based storage.
  • Storage Gateway - An iSCSI block storage virtual appliance with cloud-based backup.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Databases

  • Aurora - MySQL and PostgreSQL compatible relational database with improved performance.
  • DynamoDB - Provides a scalable, low-latency NoSQL online Database Service backed by SSDs.
  • ElastiCache - Provides in-memory caching for web apps (Memcached, Redis).
  • Redshift - Provides petabyte-scale data warehousing with columnar storage and multi-node compute.
  • Relational Database Service (RDS) - Provides a scalable database server with MySQL, Oracle, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and MariaDB support.
  • Schema Conversion Tool - App that helps you convert your database schema from an Oracle or Microsoft SQL Server database, to an RDS MySQL DB instance or an Aurora DB cluster.
  • SimpleDB - Allows developers to run queries on structured data.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Application Services

  • API Gateway - Service for publishing, maintaining and securing web service APIs.
  • AppStream - Flexible, low-latency streaming service for apps and games.
  • CloudSearch - Provides basic full-text search and indexing of textual content.
  • DevPay - Provides billing and account management.
  • Elastic Transcoder (ETS) - Provides video transcoding of S3 hosted videos.
  • Flexible Payments Service (FPS) - Provides an interface for micropayments.
  • Simple Email Service (SES) - Provides bulk and transactional email sending.
  • Simple Notification Service (SNS) - Provides a hosted multi-protocol "push" messaging for applications.
  • Simple Queue Service (SQS) - Provides a hosted message queue for web applications.
  • Simple Workflow (SWF) - A workflow service for building scalable, resilient applications.
  • Step Functions - Coordinate components of distributed applications.

    • Appendix of Core Services

    Miscellaneous Services

  • Fulfillment Web Service - Provides a programmatic web service for sellers to ship items to and from Amazon using Fulfillment by Amazon.
  • Mechanical Turk - Manages small units of work distributed among many persons.
  • Partner Network (APN) - Provides partners with the technical information and sales and marketing support to increase business opportunities.
  • Product Advertising API - Provides access to product data and electronic commerce functionality.

item.title: donnemartin/awesome-aws Oct 12th, 2015
item.description:
The Fiery Meter of AWSome

  • Repo with 0100+ Stars: 🔥
  • Repo with 0200+ Stars: 🔥🔥
  • Repo with 0500+ Stars: 🔥🔥🔥
  • Repo with 1000+ Stars: 🔥🔥🔥🔥
  • Repo with 2000+ Stars: 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

    • SDKs and Samples

    Android SDK

  • Install

    • SDKs and Samples

    C++ SDK

  • Blog with Samples

    • SDKs and Samples

    Clojure SDK

  • Installstars917
  • Docsstars917

    • SDKs and Samples

    Go SDK

  • Install
  • Docs
  • Learn More

    • SDKs and Samples

    iOS SDK

  • Install

    • SDKs and Samples

    IoT SDK

  • Repo for Arduinostars90
  • Docs

    • SDKs and Samples

    Java SDK

  • Install

    • SDKs and Samples

    JavaScript SDK

  • Install
  • Docs

    • SDKs and Samples

    PHP SDK

  • Repo with Samplesstars83
  • Install
  • Docs
  • Learn More

    • SDKs and Samples

    Python SDK

  • Installstars6.5k
  • Learn More

    • SDKs and Samples

    Scala SDK

  • Repostars74

    • SDKs and Samples

    Unity SDK

  • Install
  • Docs

    • SDKs and Samples

    Xamarin SDK

  • Repostars46
  • Blog with Samples

    • SDKs and Samples

    .NET SDK

  • Repo with Samplesstars18
  • Install

    • Command Line Tools

    Universal Command Line Interface

  • Repo 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥stars11k
  • Install
  • Docs
  • Learn More

    • Command Line Tools

    Windows PowerShell

  • Install
  • Docs
  • Learn More

    • IDE Toolkits

    Eclipse Toolkit

  • Docs
  • Learn More

    • IDE Toolkits

    Visual Studio Toolkit

  • Install
  • Learn More

    • Open Source Repos

    API Gateway

  • aws-apigateway-sdk-javastars27 - SDK for Java.

    • Open Source Repos

    CLI

  • aws-cli 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥stars11k - Universal Command Line Interface.
  • awscli-cookbookstars39 - Installs the CLI tools and provides a set of LWRPs for use within chef cookbooks.

    • Open Source Repos

    CloudFormation

  • aws-cfn-custom-resource-examplesstars81 - Custom resource examples.
  • aws-cfn-resource-bridgestars71 - Custom resource framework.
  • cfncluster-cookbookstars73 - Sample Cookbook.

    • Open Source Repos

    CloudSearch

  • cloudsearchablestars50 - An ActiveRecord-style ORM query interface.

    • Open Source Repos

    CloudTrail

  • aws-cloudtrail-processing-librarystars73 - Easily consume and process log files.

    • Open Source Repos

    CloudWatch

  • ecs-cloudwatch-logsstars69 - Assets in the blog post on using Amazon ECS and Amazon CloudWatch logs.
  • logstash-output-cloudwatchlogsstars35 - A logstash plugin that sends logs to CloudWatch.
  • opsworks-cloudwatch-logs-cookbooksstars8 - OpsWorks sample cookbook.

    • Open Source Repos

    Code Pipeline

  • aws-codepipeline-custom-job-workerstars30 - Develop your own job worker when creating a custom action.
  • aws-codepipeline-jenkins-aws-codedeploy_linuxstars34 - Four-stage pipeline for Linux.
  • aws-codepipeline-plugin-for-jenkinsstars78 - Jenkins plugin.
  • AWSCodePipeline-Jenkins-AWSCodeDeploy_Windowsstars11 - Four-stage pipeline for Windows.
  • AWSCodePipeline-S3-AWSCodeDeploy_Windowsstars7 - Simple pipeline for Windows.

    • Open Source Repos

    Cognito

  • amazon-cognito-androidstars30 - Sync SDK for Android.
  • amazon-cognito-developer-authentication-samplestars92 - Authentication sample.
  • amazon-cognito-dotnetstars6 - Sync SDK for .NET.
  • amazon-cognito-iosstars34 - Sync SDK for iOS.
  • amazon-cognito-streams-samplestars9 - Consuming Streams sample.

    • Open Source Repos

    Device Farm

  • aws-device-farm-appium-tests-for-sample-appstars75 - Appium TestNG Android tests.
  • aws-device-farm-calabash-tests-for-sample-appstars8 - Calabash Android tests.
  • aws-device-farm-gradle-pluginstars58 - Gradle plugin.
  • aws-device-farm-jenkins-pluginstars86 - Jenkins plugin.

    • Open Source Repos

    DynamoDB

  • aws-dotnet-session-providerstars28 - A session state provider for ASP.NET apps.
  • aws-dotnet-trace-listenerstars13 - A trace listener for System.Diagnostics that can be used to log events.
  • aws-dynamodb-mars-json-demostars49 - Stores and indexes NASA JPL Mars images.
  • aws-dynamodb-session-tomcatstars96 - Session store for Apache Tomcat.
  • aws-sessionstore-dynamodb-rubystars62 - Handles sessions for Ruby web apps.
  • dynamodb-import-export-toolstars89 - Import and export examples.
  • dynamodb-online-index-violation-detectorstars7 - Finds violations on an online GSI's hash key and range key.
  • dynamodb-streams-kinesis-adapterstars75 - Kinesis interface to consume and process data from a DynamoDB stream.
  • dynamodb-tictactoe-example-appstars47 - Lightweight python app.

    • Open Source Repos

    Elastic Beanstalk

  • aws-eb-glassfish-dockerfilesstars30 - GlassFish docker files.
  • aws-eb-python-dockerfilesstars58 - Python docker files.
  • eb-docker-multiple-portsstars56 - Simple Node.js and Tomcat apps using Docker images.
  • eb-docker-virtual-hostingstars30 - Simple PHP, Tomcat, and Nginx applications using Docker images.
  • eb-node-express-signupstars79 - Express framework and Bootstrap Node.js sample app.
  • eb-node-expressstars7 - Sample app referenced in the Developer Guide.
  • eb-py-flask-signup-workerstars43 - Python app that illustrates worker roles.
  • eb-python-flaskstars35 - Simple Python and Flask app.
  • eb-wif-samplestars17 - Sample login app with Web Identity Federation.

    • Open Source Repos

    Elastic Container Service

  • amazon-ecs-amazon-efsstars66 - Persists Data from containers.
  • ecs-cloudwatch-logsstars69 - Assets from the blog using Amazon ECS and Amazon CloudWatch logs.
  • ecs-mesos-scheduler-driver 🔥stars168 - Integrates Apache Mesos.
  • ecs-task-kitestars60 - Simple ambassador container for inter-task communication.
  • py-flask-signup-dockerstars77 - Python sample app.

    • Open Source Repos

    Elastic File System

  • amazon-ecs-amazon-efsstars66 - Persist data from ECS.

    • Open Source Repos

    Elastic Search

  • opsworks-elasticsearch-cookbookstars37 - OpsWorks Elasticsearch sample cookbook.

    • Open Source Repos

    Elasticache

  • aws-elasticache-cluster-client-libmemcachedstars21 - Libmemcached library support.
  • aws-elasticache-cluster-client-memcached-for-javastars75 - Client for Java.
  • aws-elasticache-cluster-client-memcached-for-phpstars54 - Enhanced PHP library connecting to ElastiCache.
  • elasticache-cluster-config-netstars24 - Config object for Enyim's MemcachedClient to enable auto discovery.

    • Open Source Repos

    Kinesis

  • amazon-kinesis-client-netstars49 - Client Library for .NET.
  • amazon-kinesis-learningstars82 - Learning Kinesis Development.
  • dynamodb-streams-kinesis-adapterstars75 - DynamoDB Streams Adapter.
  • kinesis-log4j-appenderstars60 - Log4J Appender.
  • kinesis-poster-workerstars69 - Simple multi-threaded Python Poster and Worker.
  • mqtt-kinesis-bridgestars38 - Simple MQTT bridge in Python.

    • Open Source Repos

    Lambda

  • create-thumbnails-lambdastars30 - Uses the grunt-aws-lambda plugin to help you develop and test.

    • Open Source Repos

    Mobile Analytics

  • aws-sdk-mobile-analytics-jsstars79 - JavaScript SDK.

    • Open Source Repos

    OpsWorks

  • opsworks-attribute-customizationstars3 - Attribute customization example.
  • opsworks-capistranostars8 - Capistrano with instances.
  • opsworks-cloudwatch-logs-cookbooksstars8 - CloudWatch sample cookbook.
  • opsworks-demo-php-photo-share-appstars15 - Simple PHP photo share app.
  • opsworks-demo-php-simple-appstars39 - Simple PHP app.
  • opsworks-demo-rails-photo-share-appstars15 - A sample Rails app.
  • opsworks-elasticsearch-cookbookstars37 - Elasticsearch sample cookbook.
  • opsworks-first-cookbookstars9 - Cookbook used to demonstrate simple recipes.
  • opsworks-windows-demo-stars26 - A sample Node.JS app.
  • opsworks-windows-demo-cookbooksstars8 - Cookbooks for Windows.
  • todo-sample-app-cookbooksstars5 - Custom cookbooks associated with the todo-sample-app.

    • Open Source Repos

    S3

  • grippy/node-s3stars97 - Node.js app to manage buckets.
  • marcel/aws-s3 🔥🔥🔥stars790 - Ruby implementation of Amazon's S3 REST API.
  • MathieuLoutre/grunt-aws-s3 🔥🔥stars296 - Grunt plugin.
  • tongwang/s3fs-c 🔥stars133 - Mounts buckets for use on a local file system.

    • Open Source Repos

    Simple Workflow

  • aws-flow-ruby 🔥stars137 - Creates background jobs and multistep workflows.

    • Open Source Repos

    SimpleDB

  • rjrodger/simpledb 🔥stars139 - Node.js library.

    • Open Source Repos

    Security

  • aws-sha256-agentcsstars6 - SHA256 Agent Compatibility Ccanner.
  • aws-tvm-anonymousstars31 - Token Vending Machine for Anonymous Registration.
  • aws-tvm-identitystars34 - Token Vending Machine for Identity Registration.
  • s2n 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥stars4k - An implementation of the TLS/SSL protocols.

    • Open Source Repos

    Accompanying Repos

  • aws-demo-php-simple-appstars12 - PHP apps from the AWS Blogs.
  • aws-mobile-sample-wifstars2 - Samples from the AWS Mobile SDK blog.
  • aws-mobile-self-paced-labs-samplesstars13 - Android Snake Game from a self-paced lab.
  • java-meme-generator-samplestars47 - Meme generation app from re:Invent 2012.
  • railsconf2013-tech-demo 🔥stars167 - Seahorse demo from RailsConf 2013.
  • reinvent2013-js-blog-demostars29 - Demo blogging app from re:Invent 2013.
  • reinvent2013-mobile-photo-sharestars21 - Mobile photo share app from re:Invent 2014.
  • reinvent2014-scalable-site-managementstars56 - Scalable site management sample from re:Invent 2014.
  • reinvent2015-dev309stars6 - Large Scale Metrics Analysis from re:Invent 2015.
  • timely-security-analyticsstars28 - Security analytics sample from 2015 re:Invent 2015.
  • todo-sample-appstars27 - Simple "Todo" app from RailsConf 2014.

    • Open Source Repos

    Miscellaneous Repos

  • amediamanagerstars62 - Media manager.
  • aws-hal-client-javastars15 - Java client for the Hypertext Application Language.
  • aws-model-validatorsstars9 - Tools for validating the AWS service JSON model files.
  • aws-sdk-js-sample-video-transcoderstars21 - Sample cross-platform video transcoder app.

    • Social

    Conferences

  • re:Invent - Annual user conference. The event features keynote announcements, training and certification opportunities, over 250 technical sessions, a partner expo, after hours activities, and more.
  • Summits - Global one-day events that are designed to educate new customers about the AWS platform and offer existing customers deep technical content to be more successful with AWS.

    • Latest KPIs and Stats

  • $7B+ annual revenue run-rate business.1
    • 81% year over year revenue growth.1
  • EC2 usage up 95% year over year.1
  • S3 data transfer up 120% year over year.1
    • S3 holds trillions of objects and regularly peaks at 1.5 million requests per second.2
  • Database services usage up 127% year over year.1
    • $1B annual revenue run-rate business.1
  • Customers have launched more than 15 million Hadoop clusters.3
  • 500+ major new features and services launched since 2014.1
  • All 14 other cloud providers combined have 1/5th the aggregate capacity of AWS.2
  • Every day, AWS adds enough new server capacity to support all of Amazon's global infrastructure when it was a $7B annual revenue enterprise (in 2004).2
